scripts.format: prettier --write src README.md package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src README.md package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.precommit: lint-staged && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
